# airtelcloud_security_group (Resource)

Manages an Airtel Cloud security group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `security_group_name` (String) The name of the security group.

### Optional

- `availability_zone` (String) The availability zone in which to create the security group.

### Read-Only

- `az_name` (String) The availability zone name.
- `az_region` (String) The availability zone region.
- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the security group.
- `status` (String) The current status of the security group.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the security group.
